text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 2 

ACO_ID_NUM 

LABEL: Accountable Care Organization (ACO) Identification Number 

DESCRIPTION: The field at the claim level to identify the unique identification number assigned to the Accountable 
Care Organization (ACO). 

SHORT NAME: ACO_ID_NUM 

LONG NAME: ACO_ID_NUM 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 10 

SOURCE: NCH 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This field comes from the Claim ACO Identification Number
